subcodes.first_line: O Generous One! Thy call hath reached the precincts of the Throne of the All-Merciful, and the sacred divine ears have inclined to hearken unto it. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کریم ندای تو بساحت عرش رحیم رسید و اذن مقدسه الهیه باصغای آن متوجه طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer
